overview.Name: Old National Bancorp Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of Series C Preferred Stock
overview.Description: Old National Bancorp Depositary Shares represent a 1/40th interest in a share of Series C Preferred Stock issued by Old National Bancorp, a leading Midwest financial services provider dedicated to community banking and customer-centric financial solutions. The company emphasizes sustainable shareholder value through a diverse range of banking and financial services, while maintaining a strong commitment to community engagement and support. The Series C Preferred Stock is particularly attractive to institutional investors seeking stable dividend income in a dynamic economic environment, underscoring Old National Bancorp's strategic focus on providing consistent returns in the financial sector.
overview.Address: ONE MAIN STREET, EVANSVILLE, IN, UNITED STATES, 47708
